basic_details.job_title: Kalakshetra Foundation Warden Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: The Kalakshetra Foundation has officially announced the Warden Recruitment 2026 with 1 opening. Candidates aged between 30 and 50 years who have passed XII Standard, possess good English-speaking skills, and have more than 2 years of experience as a Warden in a girls' hostel can submit their offline applications on or before 31-07-2026. Direct links to download the official notification and application details are shared below.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 30 years Maximum Age: 50 years

qualification.education_qualification: A pass in XII Std, Good English-speaking skills, Experience of working as Warden for more than 2 years in Girl's hostel
qualification.details: A pass in XII Std. Good English-speaking skills. Experience of working as Warden for more than 2 years in a Girl's hostel is a must.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Kalakshetra Foundation Warden Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 31-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for Kalakshetra Foundation Warden Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: . Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 31-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Kalakshetra Foundation Warden Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Kalakshetra Foundation Warden Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for the receipt of applications is 31st July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance of this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum and maximum age limit for the Warden post?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit is 30 years, and the maximum age limit is 50 years for the Warden post.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Warden position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary ranging from Rs. 25,000 to Rs. 30,000 per month.

faq.question: Q4. What are the essential qualifications required for the Warden post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed XII Std, possess good English-speaking skills, and have more than 2 years of experience working as a Warden in a Girl's hostel.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for the Kalakshetra Foundation Warden Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and submit it via post.

faq.question: Q7. How many vacancies are available for the Warden post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the post of Warden.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Warden post?
faq.answer: The selection process will be based on an Interview.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the Kalakshetra Foundation located?
faq.answer: The Kalakshetra Foundation is located in Chennai, Tamil Nadu, with a pincode of 600041.

faq.question: Q10. Is there any age relaxation provided?
faq.answer: The provided data does not specify any age relaxation details. Candidates are advised to refer to the official notification for any such information.
